name: orgx-codex-plugin
description: OrgX MCP access and initiative-aware Codex skills for operating inside OrgX workstreams.

interface.shortDescription: Install OrgX MCP, chronicle reporting, and initiative-aware workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundles OrgX MCP configuration, Codex skills, and runtime hook templates for operator chronicle reporting, initiative orchestration, passive Work Graph reconciliation, artifact registration, and human-in-the-loop decision flows.
defaultPrompt: Use OrgX to show my operator chronicle: yesterday, week, 30 days, decisions, PRs, artifacts, goals, gaps, and top priorities. Call get_operator_chronicle first; if this Codex session has a stale tool list, use orgx_recommend mode="morning_brief" and lead with reportingNarrative.briefMarkdown.
Use OrgX to scaffold this goal into workstreams, milestones, and tasks.
